summary: Tested Session Pricing, Gallery Overrides, and Savings Logic features. Backend tests all passing (8/8). Frontend SETUP mode UI verified with all new pricing fields working correctly.

fixed_during_testing.issue: GoLiveRequest model in surf_spots.py didn't have new pricing fields (live_photo_price, photos_included, general_photo_price, etc.)
fixed_during_testing.fix: Updated GoLiveRequest model and endpoint to accept and store session-specific pricing

fixed_during_testing.issue: Database missing columns: photos_included, general_photo_price, max_surfers, estimated_duration_hours on live_sessions table
End-session endpoint failing with 'Multiple rows found' error when multiple active sessions exist
fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed scalar_one_or_none() to scalars().first() to gracefully handle multiple sessions

SETUP_mode_pricing_fields.price_per_additional_photo: WORKING - $5 per photo with '$5 less than your gallery price!' message

live_savings_preview.strikethrough_pricing: WORKING - Shows $10 crossed out with $5 as new price
live_savings_preview.savings_message: WORKING - 'Save $5 per photo by joining now!'

backend_api.go_live_with_pricing: WORKING - POST /api/photographers/{id}/go-live accepts live_photo_price, photos_included, general_photo_price

context_for_next_testing_agent: Session Pricing and Live Savings feature fully implemented. SETUP mode in UnifiedSpotDrawer shows all new pricing fields. Backend go-live endpoint stores session-specific rates in LiveSession table. The savings calculation (general_price - live_price) is correctly computed and returned in API response.
